response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C and C++ in a professional setting (National Instruments). However, his recent work has primarily focused on web, mobile, and scripting technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, D language), with limited exposure to C++ in the past decade. His lack of recent C++ specialization, cloud platform experience (Azure), and industrial automation/cybersecurity knowledge (IEC 62443) raises concerns about his fit for the specific role.
strengths: Proven C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) demonstrating low-level and embedded systems knowledge
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a focus on testable, high-quality code
Diverse technical background with experience in performance-critical applications and software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant work ~10 years ago) and no clear evidence of STL or modern C++ practices
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, etc.) or cloud platforms (Azure)
Lacks direct experience with Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ experience and STL proficiency
